roundup.title: Google Ships Nano Banana 2 Lite & Omni Flash
roundup.subtitle: Gemini 图像视频模型双发，Claude Fable 5 全球回归
headline: @GoogleDeepMind 和 @GoogleAIStudio 今日发布 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash，两款模型分别针对高速图像生成和视频编辑场景，开发者可通过 Gemini API 立即调用。@GoogleAI 同时强调新模型在速度与成本上的显著优化。
@AnthropicAI 宣布 Claude Fable 5 完成安全升级后全球重新上线，@cursor_ai 和 @OpenRouter 同步恢复对该模型的支持，@cursor_ai 指出其在 CursorBench 上仍保持领先但单任务成本最高。
@claudeai 启动 Life Sciences 全球黑客松并提升全平台 API 速率限制，@ClaudeDevs 确认 Sonnet 与 Haiku 最高档位速率上限提升 5 倍，开发者可更灵活切换模型。
@togethercompute 完成 Series C 融资，月 token 使用量从 300 亿跃升至 400 万亿，@nvidia 同步推动 AI 工厂营收分成模式，开放基础设施正成为主流选择。

deepDives.title: Google 发布 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash
deepDives.summary: Google 推出两款新 Gemini 模型，分别主打极致速度与多模态视频编辑，开发者可通过 API 快速集成到现有工作流。

facts.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 是目前最快、最低成本的 Gemini 图像模型，文本到图像生成仅需 4 秒。
facts.quote: text-to-image outputs in 4 seconds at just $0.034 per 1K-resolution image

facts.text: Gemini Omni Flash 支持自然语言视频生成与编辑，已在 Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 上线。
facts.quote: gemini omni flash is here: our high-quality, cost-efficient model for video generation and conversational editing

bullish.text: 速度与成本极具竞争力，可直接用于高频开发者 pipeline

deepDives.title: Claude Fable 5 完成安全升级后全球回归
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 对 Fable 5 部署新分类器以阻挡网络安全滥用，Cursor 与 OpenRouter 随即恢复访问。

facts.text: Fable 5 重新上线后在 CursorBench 上继续领先，但单任务成本最高。
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor. It leads all models on CursorBench, but is the most expensive per task.

bullish.text: Fable 5 仍是 coding agent 的首选模型之一

bullets.text: @LangChain 发布 OpenWiki，可后台自动生成文档并更新 AGENTS.md
@llama_index 推出 LlamaParse MCP，支持从合同、发票中自动提取结构化数据
@runwayml 发布 Agent Skills，一条命令即可完成广告 campaign 与本地化
@HuggingPapers 报道 NVIDIA 发布 Qwen3.6-27B NVFP4 优化版，支持 262K 上下文
bullets.quote: A 27B parameter dense model with 262K context, quantized to NVFP4

bullets.text: @ollama 称 Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上提速近 90%，默认开启 MTP
bullets.quote: Gemma 4 is now nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX

bullets.text: @RekaAILabs 发布 WorldModelGym 基准，评估世界模型对 agent 决策的影响
@DrJimFan 推出 ASPIRE 机器人技能库，实现任务自进化并计划开源

talentMoves.text: @adaption_ai 聘请 @hugo_larochelle 担任 Scientific Lead

topTweets.author: @GoogleAIStudio
topTweets.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 4 秒生成图像，价格低至 $0.034/千分辨率
topTweets.whyItMatters: 提供极致性价比图像模型，加速开发者 pipeline

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Claude Fable 5 回归 CursorBench 领先但成本最高
topTweets.whyItMatters: 影响 coding agent 模型选型与成本考量

topTweets.author: @togethercompute
topTweets.text: 月 token 使用量从 300 亿跃升至 400 万亿，完成 Series C
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开放基础设施需求爆发

topTweets.author: @ClaudeDevs
topTweets.text: Sonnet 与 Haiku 最高档位速率上限提升 5 倍
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开发者可更灵活使用 Claude API

topTweets.author: @matei_zaharia
topTweets.text: Databricks 靠 KDA agents 登顶 NVIDIA SOL-ExecBench
topTweets.whyItMatters: 展示 AI agents 自主优化 kernel 的实际价值

takeaways: Gemini 新模型 4 秒生成与低成本特性值得立即接入图像/视频 pipeline。
Claude Fable 5 回归后需重新评估 coding agent 的成本与性能平衡。
速率限制提升 5 倍后，Claude API 可作为默认高并发选项考虑。
WorldModelGym 与 GeneBench-Pro 等新基准可用于评估 agent 真实科研能力。
本地模型加速（MLX+MTP）和开源 agent harness 正在成为工程标配。

items.author: @fal
items.text: Reference Video → 4K Video · Seedance 4K: feed video as reference, adds photorealistic VFX in true 4K matching composition and camera movement.
items.whyItMatters: 视频参考生成4K真实VFX，fal平台可用

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.text: live now: Startup Battlefield at @aiDotEngineer World's Fair. 18 AI-native founders. top 3 about to hit main stage. $100k on the line. no decks, no theory: working demos...
items.whyItMatters: AI初创公司现场demo与融资信号

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: OpenWiki is designed to run in the background... It'll generate docs, update your AGENTS.md so your agent automatically knows how to read the docs...
items.whyItMatters: 开源 OpenWiki 自动更新 agent docs，提升 coding agent 性能

items.author: @scaling01
items.text: SCOOP: Alexandr Wang says Meta's upcoming AI model - codenamed Watermelon - has caught up to OpenAI's GPT-5.5.
items.whyItMatters: Meta Watermelon 追上 GPT-5.5，scaling 信号

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: Announcing Built with Claude: Life Sciences, a global virtual hackathon. Join us and @GladstoneInst for a week of researching and building with Claude Science and Claude Code, with a prize pool of $100k in credits.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code/Science hackathon，10万刀credits激励

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Hermes Agent
items.whyItMatters: Hermes Agent新发布，开放AI agent进展

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: We've raised Claude Platform API rate limits for all users and simplified the tiers... The latest Sonnet and Haiku models now provide 5x higher rate limits at the highest tier. Each rate limit tier offers the same requests per minute and token throughput across the latest Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models.
items.whyItMatters: Claude API 速率限制全面提升 5 倍，简化 tiers，开发者可更灵活选择模型。

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: 30 billion tokens a month to 400 trillion in a year. That's @cursor_ai, @DecagonAI, @cartesia and hundreds of other teams choosing open infrastructure. Our Series C is fuel to take it further.
items.whyItMatters: Together AI 完成 Series C，开放基础设施 token 使用量激增，助力开源 AI 采用。

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: NVIDIA just released an optimized Qwen3.6-27B on Hugging Face. A 27B parameter dense model with 262K context, quantized to NVFP4 for Blackwell GPUs— nearly matching FP8 accuracy. Deploy with SGLang or vLLM right away.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA 发布 Qwen3.6-27B NVFP4 优化版，支持 262K 上下文，Blackwell GPU 高效部署。

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab and Bridgewater... fine-tune using TML's Tinker API... results: 84.7%, with mistakes down 29.8% versus the top frontier model tested, and at a 13.8x lower per-task cost.
items.whyItMatters: 专家微调开放模型在金融任务达 84.7% 准确率，成本降 13.8 倍，展示 RLHF 实用价值。

items.whyItMatters: 2026 先进封装与 HBM 技术路线图汇总

items.author: @bcherny
items.text: Artifacts in Claude Code have been life changing. Excited to expand to Pro and Max! Artifacts in Claude Code are now also available on Pro and Max plans.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code Artifacts扩展至Pro/Max计划，提升开发体验

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: World models are increasingly central to how agents learn and plan. Today we're releasing WorldModelGym, a benchmark built around a single question: if an agent uses a world model to choose among actions, does it pick the right one?
items.whyItMatters: WorldModelGym：决策保真度世界模型基准

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Introducing Agent Skills. Build an ad campaign, create a commercial, localize your ads and more with a simple command. Type /, choose a Skill and Agent gets to work. Scale your marketing. On command.
items.whyItMatters: Runway Agent Skills：命令驱动营销代理

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: NASA's Johnson Space Center is testing RamaLama to power a medical AI assistant for deep space missions. The Crew Medical Officer Digital Assistant (CMO-DA) runs LLMs and vision models locally on HPE hardware.
items.whyItMatters: NASA 太空任务本地开源医疗 AI 部署

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Can agents collaborate to gather *all* information on a research topic and write it up it in a useful deep research wiki the size of many books? We launched a collab on RL for LLMs and they already made impressive progress in a few days.
items.whyItMatters: 多代理协作 RL 研究 wiki 自动生成

items.author: @adaption_ai
items.text: Adaption is proud to welcome @hugo_larochelle Ph.D. as Scientific Lead. Hugo is the Scientific Director at @Mila_Quebec and a defining voice in modern AI research.
items.whyItMatters: 知名研究者加入强化研究团队

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: Preorder here https://tinycorp.myshopify.com/products/exabox-preorder
items.whyItMatters: 新GPU硬件exabox预售

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Databricks ranks #1 on NVIDIA’s SOL-ExecBench kernel leaderboard, in the L1 single operation track, powered by KDA (Kernel Design Agents) 🎉 What’s crazy is: we 100% leveraged AI agents to beat the competition.
items.whyItMatters: AI agents 自主优化 GPU kernel 登顶 leaderboard

items.author: @mathemagic1an
items.text: Interesting approach to long context/continual learning here from @baseten at @cursor_ai. Compact long trajectories by compressing a prefix of the KV cache using an MLP/autoencoder... If building a task-specific KV cache compression ends up being more sample efficient than running backprop, getting this to "work" feels
items.whyItMatters: KV cache压缩新方法，助力长上下文Agent

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Fun surprise: DeepSeek used my open-perfectblend dataset to train their new DSpark drafter. Time to promote it again! It's an open-source reproduction of "The Perfect Blend" paper. If you ever need >1M diverse prompts in math, chat, and code, it does the job.
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek采用开源数据集，验证其价值

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: We are licensing Laguna XS 2.1 under OpenMDW-1.1. We are making this change to support open model distribution for the community. OpenMDW-1.1 is fully permissive... XS 2.1 is supported in vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, Hugging Face Transformers, and @ollama, with BF16, FP8, INT4, and NVFP4 checkpoints available.
items.whyItMatters: Poolside开源模型更新，支持多推理引擎

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: AI is shifting from model training to always-on token production, and that shift demands a new business model. NVIDIA is partnering with AI clouds to deploy large‑scale, multi‑tenant AI factories through revenue-sharing and credit-support. This opens up compute access to the fast‑growing AI ecosystem...
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA推AI工厂新商业模式，降低算力门槛

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow. After a series of productive conversations with the US government, we're redeploying the model with a new set of classifiers to target and block more cybersecurity tasks...
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 恢复全球可用，影响 Cursor/Claude Code 等 coding 工具使用

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor. It leads all models on CursorBench, but is the most expensive per task.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 回归 Cursor，CursorBench 领先，影响 coding agent 选择

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: We’re shipping 2 major releases: Nano Banana 2 Lite: our fastest and cheapest Gemini Image model. Gemini Omni Flash: now available via the Gemini API and in @GoogleAIStudio to help developers generate and edit high-quality videos.
items.whyItMatters: 新Gemini图像与视频模型发布，API可用，提速迭代

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Gemma 4 is now nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX! The speedup comes from improved multi-token prediction (MTP), now on by default for Gemma 4.
items.whyItMatters: 本地模型推理大幅加速，MLX+MTP优化实用

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Claude Sonnet 5 is now available in Perplexity for Pro and Max subscribers. You can also select it as an orchestrator model in Computer.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Sonnet 5集成Perplexity，扩展用户选择

items.author: @llama_index
items.text: We just made it a lot easier for AI agents to work with your documents. LlamaParse MCP now does more than parse or classify files: it can pull structured data out of contracts, invoices, and reports automatically.
items.whyItMatters: MCP增强文档解析，赋能agent结构化数据提取

items.author: @code
items.text: 🚀 Build and test web apps right in the browser with @code! ... The Agents window (Preview) also introduces guided onboarding tours... Managing multiple agent sessions just got easier. Group related sessions... Subagent credit reporting now shows the cost of delegated work.
items.whyItMatters: VS Code 新增 Agents 窗口、多会话管理和子代理成本追踪，提升 AI 编码工作流效率。

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text:
New ways you can use Gemini Spark to make your life easier.

From integration in the Gemini app for macOS to smart triggers, here are five ways we’re making Gemini Spark an even more powerful personal AI agent to help you get things done around the clock.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Spark 个人 AI Agent 新功能 Beta 上线

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text:
Claude Fable 5 from @Anthropic is back on OpenRouter!

Anthropic is redeploying it globally with new safeguards for cybersecurity misuse. Some coding and debugging requests may temporarily fall back to Opus 4.8 while classifiers are refined.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Fable 5 回归，支持全球访问

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: Today, we give robots a /skills library that self-evolves... Introducing ASPIRE: a robot solving its 100th task is no longer as clueless as solving its first... We'll open-source the full stack... Project gallery and whitepaper: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/gear/aspire/
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA开源ASPIRE机器人技能库，实现持续自进化学习

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: SynthID watermarking now supports video, audio, text; watermarked 100B+ images/videos; open-sourced text watermarking; working with OpenAI, NVIDIA, Apple.
items.whyItMatters: AI内容溯源技术重大更新，支持多模态并开源

items.author: @tszzl
items.text: you either die a frontier lab or live long enough to see yourself sell compute
items.whyItMatters: 洞察前沿实验室商业化趋势

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: People sometimes ask why fine-tune when general-purpose models keep getting better. Bridgewater's work is a good reminder that with the right data -- here, expert judgements -- you can beat prompting-only approaches by a lot.
items.whyItMatters: 专家数据微调显著优于 prompting

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Imitation Learning for Multi-turn LM Agents via On-policy Expert Corrections https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14895
items.whyItMatters: 新论文聚焦多轮LM Agent的模仿学习与专家修正，对Agent开发有直接参考价值

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: VeRO: An Evaluation Harness for Agents to Optimize Agents https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22480
items.whyItMatters: Agent优化Agent的评估框架，benchmark与harness新方法值得关注

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: what is the mixture-of-agents feature in Hermes Agent... you send one prompt to a council of models... synthesizes them into one final answer
items.whyItMatters: Hermes Agent v0.18原生支持mixture-of-agents，跨模型验证提升输出可靠性

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Today, we're launching Vals Public Sector: independent AI evaluation for government... bringing that same rigor to support government
items.whyItMatters: Vals推出政府AI评估服务， frontier模型公共基准扩展到公共部门

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: Claude Pro and Max users can now access Artifacts on Claude Code as well... Everything is an Artifact
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code Artifacts向Pro/Max开放，实时交互式代码产物生成能力升级

items.author: @saranormous
items.text: super impressive example of combining machines-asking-humans in order to efficiently direct use of compute against a goal
items.whyItMatters: 零人公司Agent案例：2000次访谈+100概念迭代产出付费App，展示自主workflow潜力

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind of AI progress: how well agents can navigate messy biological data...
items.whyItMatters: 新 agent 生物数据 benchmark，评估真实科研能力

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text:
introducing nano banana 2 lite: our fastest, most cost-effective gemini image model yet

built for high-velocity developer pipelines, it delivers text-to-image outputs in 4 seconds at just $0.034 per 1K-resolution image

swap it into your workflow today via ai studio and the gemini api
items.whyItMatters: 新图像模型发布，速度与成本极具竞争力

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text:
gemini omni flash is here: our high-quality, cost-efficient model for video generation and conversational editing

designed to support multimodal workflows, it enables you to refine videos using natural language and simple prompting

start building with it today via ai studio and the gemini api
items.whyItMatters: 多模态视频生成新模型，支持自然语言编辑

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: “Loop engineering” is a hot buzzphrase... In this letter, I’d like to share my 3 key loops... for building 0-to-1 products. These loops guide not just how I build software, but also how I decide what software to build. Agentic coding loop... Developer feedback loop... External feedback loop...
items.whyItMatters: 详解AI agent coding三大循环，指导0-1产品构建

items.author: @bcherny
items.text: You asked, we listened. Claude Desktop on Linux is here! Download link: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/desktop-linux Claude Desktop is now available on Linux (Ubuntu and Debian) in beta.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code Linux桌面版上线，支持全平台开发

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Introducing Nano Banana 2 Lite (fastest image model, <4s) and Gemini Omni Flash (video gen & editing) – combine for creative workflows.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini新图像/视频模型发布，速度与成本优化

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: Legora searches 2B+ legal documents on turbopuffer → strict per-matter data isolation with CMEK → 10x lower tail latency than Postgres → 98% avg recall@10
items.whyItMatters: 真实benchmark展示向量搜索性能

items.author: @XiaomiMiMo
items.text: Open-weights are taking over — proud to see more developers building on MiMo. 👏 @cline
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型被Cline等工具采用信号

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: We’re launching Nano Banana 2 Lite, our fastest most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet... Alongside it, Gemini Omni Flash, our video generation and editing model is now available to developers.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 新模型发布：图像 4s 生成低成本、视频生成编辑 API 上线。

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: This year, the local model is becoming critical infrastructure at every scale: the individual (privacy, cost), the company (data control, cost), the nation (resilience). @rasbt's new writeup walks through setting this up locally, with a nod to @cohere's North Mini Code (Nomico), open under Apache 2.0.
items.whyItMatters: 本地模型部署与 coding agent 实践指南

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: We're open-sourcing a new benchmark on @huggingface: IFStruct. The goal is to measure output validity and schema following across diverse prompts. We also detail how we generated it and the design choices behind it in our blog post.
items.whyItMatters: 新结构化输出基准，上HF leaderboard

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: We’re sharing the next major milestone in our non-invasive brain-to-text decoder research: Brain2Qwerty v2. ... Avg word accuracy of 61% across participants, 78% for top performer. Releasing full training code and dataset.
items.whyItMatters: 脑信号到文本解码新突破，代码数据集开源

items.author: @aye_aye_kaplan
items.text: me with Cursor for iOS
items.whyItMatters: Cursor iOS App 发布，支持云端 Agent 远程控制与 Composer 折扣。

items.author: @_albertgu
items.text: Transformers are better at copying, while RNNs are better at modeling "meaning-bearing words—the nouns, verbs, & adjectives that say what a sentence is about"
items.whyItMatters: 混合模型中Transformer与RNN行为差异分析

items.author: @METR_Evals
items.text: You can find additional information about our pre-deployment evaluation of GPT-5.6 Sol on our website: https://metr.org/blog/2026-06-26-gpt-5-6-sol
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 Sol 部署前对齐与能力评估报告

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: C, Sí, or Sea?? The context carryover feature of Universal-3.5 Pro Realtime knows 🤓
items.whyItMatters: 实时语音模型上下文延续功能演示，提升多语言准确性。
